person.name: Oda de Conteville
person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
«b»Biography«/b»
Nothing is known of the family background of Waleran's first wife, Oda. All we know of her for certain is that she was mother of five children by 1024, and after her husband unsuccessfully tried to get their marriage annulled she died as a nun at Notre-Dame de Coulombs by 1033.

«b»Marriage«/b»
Oda Conteville married Waleran III, Count of Meulan, son of Hugh I, Viscount & Count of Meulan and Adelaide of Amiens. 

«b»Children«/b»
Adeline.
Hugh.

«b»Research Notes«/b»
Oda de Conteville's alleged father, John de Bourg/Jean (Conteville) de Burgo, is said to be fictitious. She has been disconnected as the daughter of Jean de Conteville.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Oda
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Apparently a short form of any of the given names ending in these letters, for example,   Fiona   and   Anona  , now well established as an independent given name.

en.lifeSummary: Oda de Conteville was born in Conteville, Eure, Normandy, France. She had at least 1 son and 3 daughters with Galeran de Beaumont Comte de Meulan. She died in 1062, in Pontoise, Val-d'Oise, Île-de-France, France, and was buried in Pontoise, Val-d'Oise, Île-de-France, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Oda de Conteville est née à Conteville, Eure, Normandie, France. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles avec Galeran de Beaumont Comte de Meulan. Elle est décédée en 1062, à Pontoise, Val-d'Oise, Île-de-France, France, et a été enterrée à Pontoise, Val-d'Oise, Île-de-France, France.

de.lifeSummary: Oda de Conteville wurde in Conteville, Eure, Normandie, Frankreich geboren. Sie hatte mit Galeran de Beaumont Comte de Meulan mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1062 in Pontoise, Val-d'Oise, Île-de-France, Frankreich und wurde in Pontoise, Val-d'Oise, Île-de-France, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Oda de Conteville è nata il nel Conteville, Eure, Normandie, Francia. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie con Galeran de Beaumont Comte de Meulan. Morì nel 1062, nel Pontoise, Val-d'Oise, Île-de-France, Francia, e fu sepolta a Pontoise, Val-d'Oise, Île-de-France, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Oda de Contevilleはフランスノーマンディエウアコンテヴィルで生まれた。彼女はGaleran de Beaumont Comte de Meulanとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1062年にフランスiレ-デ-フランスヴァル-ド'オイゼポントイゼで死去し，フランスiレ-デ-フランスヴァル-ド'オイゼポントイゼにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Oda de Conteville(은)는 프랑스 노먼디 우르 콘테빌에서 태어났다. 그녀는 Galeran de Beaumont Comte de Meulan(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1062년 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 발-드'이스 폰토이스에서 사망했으며 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 발-드'이스 폰토이스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Oda de Conteville nasceu em Conteville, Eure, Normandie, França. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas com Galeran de Beaumont Comte de Meulan. Ela faleceu em 1062, em Pontoise, Val-d'Oise, Île-de-France, França, e foi sepultada em Pontoise, Val-d'Oise, Île-de-France, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Oda de Conteville родилась в местности контевилл, эур, норманди, Франция. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери от Galeran de Beaumont Comte de Meulan. Она умерла в 1062 г. в местности понтоис, вал-д'оис, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция и была похоронена в местности понтоис, вал-д'оис, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Oda de Conteville nació en Conteville, Eure, Normandie, Francia. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas con Galeran de Beaumont Comte de Meulan. Murió en 1062, en Pontoise, Val-d'Oise, Île-de-France, Francia, y fue sepultada en Pontoise, Val-d'Oise, Île-de-France, Francia.
